command:
echo "=== REMY SOUL.MD CONTENT ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199 \
  "cat /home/jose/.openclaw/workspace/SOUL.md 2>/dev/null"

echo "=== REMY OPENCLAW.JSON (full relevant keys) ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199 \
  "python3 -c \"
import json
d = json.load(open('/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json'))
keys = ['name','telegram','bot_token','identity','system_prompt','personality','agents','gateway']
for k in keys:
    if k in d: print(k+':', str(d[k])[:500])
print('all keys:', list(d.keys()))
\" 2>/dev/null"

echo "=== REMY TELEGRAM VIA OPENCLAW PLUGINS ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199 \
  "ls /home/jose/.openclaw/plugins/ 2>/dev/null; cat /home/jose/.openclaw/plugins/telegram* 2>/dev/null | head -30"

echo "=== CLOUDFLARE TUNNEL (vm-claude-hub) ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.191 \
  "cloudflared tunnel list 2>/dev/null | head -10; ls ~/.cloudflared/ 2>/dev/null; cat ~/.cloudflared/config.yml 2>/dev/null"

echo "=== SAKURA hermes-agent install source ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 \
  "cat /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/pyproject.toml | grep -E 'name|version|url' | head -10; git -C /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent remote -v 2>/dev/null"
